title: Ecosystem map source view
goal: Add a Leitstand /ecosystem-map source view and dashboard card that display Cabinet map sources, provenance, freshness, and boundary notes without implying truth authority.

acceptance.assertion: /ecosystem-map renders a page for valid and missing source states.
The landing dashboard links to the ecosystem map view and shows source/freshness status.
The page visibly states that Cabinet owns canonical map semantics and Leitstand is view-only.
The view provides no dispatch, edit, merge, repair, or refresh actions that mutate external systems.

metadata.implementation_bias: show raw Mermaid and metadata before polished rendering
metadata.outcome: Implemented together with T002 through Leitstand PR #145: /ecosystem-map, the dashboard entry, provenance/freshness presentation and visible view-only boundary shipped in one merge and remain present in the current production release with later rendering and source-alignment hardening.

validation.implementation_ci: PR #145 passed CI build, security-hygiene, ai-context guards and Cloudflare Pages before merge.
validation.implementation_files: PR #145 changed src/server.ts, src/views/ecosystem-map.ejs, src/views/index.ejs, src/controllers/ecosystemMap.ts and controller tests.
validation.current_live: Current Leitstand main 550ee75ff365cdc0b82e82a10557817fb9d12130 is deployed; / and /ecosystem-map return HTTP 200, the dashboard contains /ecosystem-map, and the map page visibly states Nur Ansicht and Systemkatalog ownership.

verified_acceptance.route-renders: PR #145 added the /ecosystem-map server route and source view. Controller coverage included valid and missing sources; the current production route returns HTTP 200.
verified_acceptance.dashboard-card: PR #145 modified src/views/index.ejs to expose the ecosystem map; the current live dashboard contains /ecosystem-map and source freshness/status text.
verified_acceptance.boundary-visible: The shipped source view made the canonical source owner and non-claims visible. Current production strengthens this wording to Nur Ansicht and states that Systemkatalog owns systems, relationships and meanings.
verified_acceptance.no-action-buttons: PR #145 introduced no dispatch, edit, merge, repair or external refresh mutation path. Current view remains read-only; its buttons are local fullscreen controls, not external-system actions.
